content_markdown:
# "Strong in the Lord"
## Scripture
"Put on the whole armor of God, that you may be able to stand against the schemes of the devil." – Ephesians 6:11
## Reflection
As men, we strive to be strong in many areas of our lives. We want to provide for our families, protect our communities, and stand up for what we believe in. But let's not forget that true strength comes from the Lord. When we put on the whole armor of God, we're not just talking about physical protection; we're talking about spiritual protection. We're talking about being equipped with the truth of God's Word, the shield of faith, and the sword of the Spirit. When we're strong in the Lord, we can face any challenge that comes our way. We can stand firm against the schemes of the enemy and live a life that honors God.

## Daily Challenge
"Do 20 squats while praying for spiritual strength and protection."
